summary: Investigation reveals the diagnosis scanner reports 0 TSX files despite 80 TSX and 33 TS files existing in web/dashboard/src. The scanning logic needs correction to properly enumerate frontend artifacts.

user_stories.i_want: the project scanner to accurately count all TypeScript and TSX files
user_stories.so_that: we have correct metrics about the frontend codebase size and composition
acceptance_criteria: Scanner reports correct count of TSX files (actual: 80)
Scanner reports correct count of TS files (actual: 33)
Scanner distinguishes between component files (TSX) and utility files (TS)

user_stories.so_that: I can track progress and understand codebase organization
acceptance_criteria: Scanner reports files per feature module (agents, auth, dashboard, devices, documents, jobs, printers, settings)
Scanner reports test file counts per module
Scanner distinguishes between src/features, src/pages, src/components, src/layouts

user_stories.i_want: the scanner to verify TypeScript configuration
user_stories.so_that: we ensure the frontend is properly configured for type checking
acceptance_criteria: Scanner checks for correct jsx configuration (react-jsx)
Scanner confirms path aliases (@/*) are configured

functional_requirements.title: Accurate TSX File Enumeration
functional_requirements.description: Update scanning logic to correctly identify and count all .tsx files in the web/dashboard directory, excluding node_modules and dist directories. Must find files in src/features, src/pages, src/components, src/layouts directories.

functional_requirements.title: TypeScript File Enumeration
functional_requirements.description: Count all .ts files excluding .d.ts type definition files, node_modules, and build artifacts. Include API files, hooks, services, and utility modules.

functional_requirements.title: Feature Module Breakdown
functional_requirements.description: Provide per-feature file counts for: agents (6 files), auth (6 files), dashboard (10 files), devices (8 files), documents (9 files), jobs (8 files), printers (2 files), settings (8 files).

functional_requirements.title: Test File Enumeration
functional_requirements.description: Separate counting of test files (*.test.tsx, *.test.ts) from production code to provide accurate test coverage metrics.

functional_requirements.title: Secure Print Release
functional_requirements.description: Users authenticate at printer to release jobs, preventing abandoned documents
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Prevents data breaches from uncollected documents

functional_requirements.title: Print Quota & Cost Allocation
functional_requirements.description: Department/user-level quotas with cost center billing
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Enables cost recovery and chargeback models

functional_requirements.title: Microsoft 365 Integration
functional_requirements.description: Universal Print integration, Azure AD sync, SharePoint printing

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Scanner must complete within 5 seconds for codebases up to 10,000 files
File counting must be 100% accurate - zero false negatives
Scanning logic must handle future addition of new feature modules without code changes

risks.risk: Scanner may be using incorrect glob patterns or missing the web/dashboard directory entirely
risks.mitigation: Verify scanner configuration includes web/dashboard/src in search paths, uses pattern '**/*.tsx' with proper base directory

risks.risk: Scanner may be filtering out TSX files due to incorrect file extension matching
risks.mitigation: Review extension matching logic to ensure .tsx is not confused with .ts or excluded

risks.risk: Scanner may be throwing an error silently during frontend scanning
risks.mitigation: Add error handling and logging to diagnose-scanner to capture any failures during file enumeration

implementation_phases.name: Diagnose Scanner Logic
tasks: Locate the diagnostic scanner code that generates diagnosis.json
Review the glob patterns and search paths used for TSX file enumeration
Add debug logging to trace scanner execution through frontend code path

implementation_phases.name: Fix File Enumeration
tasks: Update scanner base path to include web/dashboard/src
Correct glob pattern from '*.tsx' to '**/*.tsx' or use find command equivalent
Add exclusion patterns for node_modules, dist, build artifacts

implementation_phases.name: Add Feature Breakdown
tasks: Implement per-module counting for src/features subdirectories
Separate test file counting from production code

implementation_phases.name: Verify and Test
tasks: Run scanner and verify tsx_files count equals 80
Confirm diagnosis.json updated with correct values
Add regression test for scanner accuracy

key_gaps: Secure print release with user authentication at device
Environmental impact reporting and sustainability metrics
Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace deep integration
Print quota management and cost allocation
unique_selling_points: Modern microservices architecture vs legacy monoliths
Vendor-agnostic by design with no hardware lock-in
Built for cloud-native deployment from ground up
